column1: #mapping_set_description: "Mappings from Energy News Ontology v0.3.0 to Open Energy Ontology (OEO)"

column8: Both model power generation facilities as material entities under BFO; enews is broader (includes thermal-only plants)
Both are material entities for energy conversion; OEO class is broader (includes fossil units)
Both represent technology concepts; OEO models as IAO plan specification; enews as BFO:GDC
Strong semantic match; both represent government action specifications promoting energy transformation
OEO institution is broader (any org serving social purpose); enews restricts to regulatory function
Both model power generation capacity; OEO is more specific (rating of generator/power generating unit)
Both model organizations in energy domain; OEO classifies as BFO immaterial entity
